01-billing-pipeline.json.notes: Stripe subscription webhook → update DB to Pro → Telegram + tg_alert_acks idempotent row + 3-button ack-keyboard (ADR-0038 W3 §3.2).

02-failed-payment-recovery.json.notes: Stripe failed-payment webhook → Telegram + tg_alert_acks idempotent row + 3-button ack-keyboard (ADR-0038 W3 §3.2) + Resend email → 24h wait → downgrade if >=4 attempts.

03-sentry-alert-routing.json.notes: Sentry webhook → severity filter → fatal (P0) / warning (P1) → tg_alert_acks idempotent row + 3-button ack-keyboard (ADR-0038 W3 §3.2).

04-daily-backup-verification.json.notes: Cron 03:00 UTC → Railway API latest deployments → Sanity SQL check → Telegram OK / CRITICAL+ack-row. Wave 3 §3.2 (ADR-0038): the CRITICAL branch posts an idempotent row to /api/internal/alerts/post and adds a 3-button inline-keyboard (✅ Прочитав / 🔄 Розбираю / 🔕 Замутити 30хв) — clicks land in WF-104. Reference impl for the alert ack-button surface; other 17 alert workflows wired in follow-up sub-PRs.

05-renovate-pr-auto-handler.json.notes: GitHub webhook → Renovate PR → auto-approve patch / Telegram review needed + tg_alert_acks idempotent row + 3-button ack-keyboard (non-patch branch only, ADR-0038 W3 §3.2).

06-mono-webhook-enrichment.json.notes: Mono webhook → Claude AI categorize → monthly budget check → Telegram alert if over ₴15K + tg_alert_acks idempotent row + 3-button ack-keyboard (ADR-0038 W3 §3.2).

07-morning-briefing-push.json.notes: User push workflow; requires product approval before activation.

08-weekly-financial-digest.json.notes: Weekly AI digest; token usage must be monitored before production activation. Post-ADR-0038 W3 §3.2 (O9) also writes idempotent tg_alert_acks row (topic=digest, P2) + renders 3-button ack-keyboard.

09-habit-streak-alert.json.notes: User engagement push workflow; keep inactive until notification policy is approved.

10-debt-receivable-reminder.json.notes: Debt reminders; keep inactive until debt schema and push copy are verified.

15-railway-deployment-notify.json.notes: Railway webhook notifications. Active; webhook path /webhook/railway-deploy. Railway-side wiring is per-project: Project Settings → Webhooks → Add URL https://n8n-production-09ac.up.railway.app/webhook/railway-deploy → Save → Test Webhook. Required on humorous-eagerness (sergeant-api) and grateful-nurturing (n8n). See docs/integrations/railway-vercel.md §8 for full procedure incl. event-type reference and cleanup of stale rules. Post-ADR-0038 W3 §3.2 (O9) also writes idempotent tg_alert_acks row with dynamic topic (success→ops/P2, failure→incidents/P1) + renders 3-button ack-keyboard.

16-posthog-daily-metrics.json.notes: Daily 09:00 Kyiv → PostHog HogQL (count pageviews + uniq distinct_id) for yesterday → Telegram #growth. POSTHOG_HOST defaults to https://eu.i.posthog.com when unset; POSTHOG_API_KEY must be a Personal API key (phx_…) with project read access. Activated by PR-11 (`docs/planning/pr-plan-2026-05.md`); env vars must be set on n8n Railway (Settings → Environment Variables) before flipping the workflow active in the n8n UI. If env is missing the workflow still sends a graceful Telegram alert pointing at the missing config instead of crashing. Post-ADR-0038 W3 §3.2 (O9) also writes idempotent tg_alert_acks row (topic=growth, P2) + renders 3-button ack-keyboard.

17-github-pr-stale-alert.json.notes: PR hygiene reminder. Cron Mon–Fri 10:00 Kyiv against skords-01/sergeant open PRs > 48h, post-ADR-0038 W3 §3.2 also writes idempotent tg_alert_acks row + renders 3-button ack-keyboard.

18-nightly-security-audit.json.notes: Nightly security audit status report. Cron fires daily 04:00 UTC against the .github/workflows/nightly-audit.yml run history; alerts only if latest conclusion is failure/cancelled, post-ADR-0038 W3 §3.2 also writes idempotent tg_alert_acks row + renders 3-button ack-keyboard.

19-db-health-report.json.notes: DB health weekly digest. Cron Mon 07:00 Kyiv. Sequential chain (DB size → Top tables → Slow queries → Format → Telegram) with executeOnce=true on chained postgres+code nodes. pg_stat_statements may be absent and is tolerated via continueOnFail. Post-ADR-0038 W3 §3.2 also writes idempotent tg_alert_acks row + renders 3-button ack-keyboard.

20-agent-dispatcher.json.notes: Telegram console webhook dispatcher. Receives approved/read-only agent commands from tools/openclaw and returns a task acceptance payload; keep inactive until N8N_AGENT_DISPATCHER_WEBHOOK_URL is configured for the console.

25-morning-briefing-cron.json.notes: Daily 07:00 Kyiv → POST /api/internal/openclaw/briefing/morning (PR-26 hardcoded-template; 5 sections: Stripe / PostHog / GitHub PR-queue / n8n workflows / Sentry) → POST /api/internal/webhook-events/record (PR-28 exec audit log) + DM founder via @OpenClaw_sergeant_bot raw HTTP. Activate after OPENCLAW_BOT_TOKEN + OPENCLAW_FOUNDER_TG_USER_ID set on n8n Railway. Briefing endpoint завжди 200 з graceful-degrade — секції з missing env-vars рендерять notConfigured-hint замість failing 5xx. LLM-summarization (PR-27 next-up у roadmap-у) поки НЕ підключений; cron шле raw template markdown.

26-strategic-weekly.json.notes: PR-34 (pr-plan-2026-05) strategic mode skeleton. Weekly Mon 09:00 Kyiv → fan-out across 4 personas (finyk/fizruk/nutrition/routine) → POST /api/internal/strategic/weekly-checkin для кожної; кожен запит INSERT-ить placeholder-goal у `strategic_goals` (migration 062). Поки що — лише datalayer marker, без LLM conversation. Activate after STRATEGIC_FOUNDER_USER_ID set on n8n Railway (Better Auth opaque founder ID). PR-35+ replace placeholder з real planning conversation.

27-monthly-okr-cron.json.notes: 1st of month 09:00 Kyiv → POST /api/internal/openclaw/ritual/monthly (O3 Phase 2.B; 4 sections: narrative / OKR progress per KR / monthly wins / risks & blockers) → POST /api/internal/webhook-events/record + DM founder. Reporting month = previous calendar month. OKR-список — INTERIM_OKRS hardcoded (apps/server/src/modules/openclaw/monthly-okr/okrs.ts) як fallback; PR-34 strategic_goals DB-table (migration 062) merged — наступний follow-up може замінити INTERIM_OKRS на DB-query. Wins/risks через GitHub closed PRs (30d window) + Sentry unresolved + stale open PRs (>30d). LLM narrative — claude-sonnet-4-6 з StubProvider fallback.

28-weekly-review-cron.json.notes: Friday 18:00 Kyiv → POST /api/internal/openclaw/ritual/weekly (O3 Phase 2.B; 5 sections: narrative / shipped / metrics with delta vs prev week / open commitments / Sentry alerts) → POST /api/internal/webhook-events/record + DM founder via @OpenClaw_sergeant_bot. LLM narrative — claude-sonnet-4-6 via LLMProvider (PR-23), StubProvider fallback (PR-25 pattern). Endpoint 200 з graceful-degrade на missing env-vars (sections рендерять notConfigured-hint). Активуй після OPENCLAW_BOT_TOKEN + OPENCLAW_FOUNDER_TG_USER_ID + LLM_DIGEST_PROVIDER на n8n Railway. Slot 28 — slot 26 зайняв PR-34 strategic_weekly cron (Mon 09:00 per-persona DB writes); 27 — місячний OKR ritual нижче.

29-rag-eval-weekly-cron.json.notes: Weekly Mon 06:00 Kyiv → POST GitHub workflow_dispatch /repos/Skords-01/Sergeant/actions/workflows/rag-quality-gate.yml/dispatches (з inputs mode=mock, thresholds, post_to_internal=true). GH Action (PR-22) запускає eval CLI + після успіху POST-ить summary на /api/internal/eval/rag-weekly (новий endpoint цього PR — record у n8n_failure_events + Prom gauges + Sentry + auto-flip kill-switch `mono_ai_memory_ingest` при recall@4 < 0.4). На non-204 GitHub response → Telegram alert у #ops topic. Requires GITHUB_PAT з workflow scope. Активувати у self-hosted n8n після того як GH Action PR-22 розширений `post_to_internal=true` input-ом (окремий follow-up PR через OAuth workflow-scope обмеження).

30-ai-memory-daily-digest.json.notes: Daily 09:05 Kyiv → SELECT з ai_memories (rolling 24h totals + per-source breakdown + lifetime) → Telegram #digest. Aggregated only, без user_id у тексті. Voyage cost — rough estimate з total chars (chars/4 tokens × $0.02 / 1M). Activated by PR-21 (`docs/planning/pr-plan-2026-05.md`). Pre-requisite: ingestion-flag-и (`MONO_AI_MEMORY_INGEST_ENABLED=true`, PR-19) і master `AI_MEMORY_ENABLED=true` у Railway, щоб таблиця наповнювалась. Operator-toggle `MONO_AI_MEMORY_DIGEST_ENABLED=true` має бути виставлений на n8n Railway env перед тим, як активувати workflow toggle у n8n UI (canonical-source — `apps/server/src/env/env.ts`; default `false` keeps WF-30 dormant навіть після деплою JSON). При empty `ai_memories` workflow надсилає graceful «За добу нічого не записано» message — не падає. Post-ADR-0038 W3 §3.2 (O9) also writes idempotent tg_alert_acks row (topic=digest, P2) + renders 3-button ack-keyboard.

60-growth-funnel-snapshot.json.notes: Daily 02:30 Kyiv → PostHog HogQL count distinct users per funnel step (visit/signup/onboard/first_action/paid) for yesterday → POST /api/internal/growth/funnel (mig 019, growth_funnel_daily) → Telegram summary. POSTHOG_HOST defaults to https://eu.i.posthog.com; POSTHOG_API_KEY must be a Personal API key (phx_…). PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL defaults to https://api.invalid.local so the workflow proceeds gracefully on missing env. POST /api/internal/growth/funnel uses onError=continueRegularOutput so a Telegram alert is always sent. Required PostHog events: $pageview, signup_completed, onboarding_completed, first_action_completed, subscription_started — until instrumented, non-visit steps will read 0. Post-ADR-0038 W3 §3.2 (O9) also writes idempotent tg_alert_acks row (topic=growth, P2) + renders 3-button ack-keyboard.

63-growth-acquisition-snapshot.json.notes: Daily 02:35 Kyiv → PostHog HogQL count signups by ($utm_source, $utm_medium, $utm_campaign) for yesterday → POST /api/internal/growth/acquisition (mig 019, growth_acquisition_daily) → Telegram top-5 channels. POSTHOG_HOST defaults to https://eu.i.posthog.com; POSTHOG_API_KEY must be a Personal API key (phx_…). PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL defaults to https://api.invalid.local so the workflow proceeds gracefully on missing env. POST /api/internal/growth/acquisition uses onError=continueRegularOutput so a Telegram alert is always sent. spendCents/cacCents stay 0/null until ad-platform integration is wired (Google Ads, Meta, etc.). Post-ADR-0038 W3 §3.2 (O9) also writes idempotent tg_alert_acks row (topic=growth, P2) + renders 3-button ack-keyboard.

98-error-handler.json.notes: Global n8n error workflow. Configure as the Error Workflow in n8n settings. Post-ADR-0038 W3 §3.2 (O9) also writes idempotent tg_alert_acks row keyed on (failed_workflow_id, error_signature) so the 30-min SQL cooldown maps 1:1 to one ack-row per failure class (topic=meta, P0) + renders 3-button ack-keyboard. WF-98 has no errorWorkflow of its own — the chained POST /alerts/post cannot loop back.

99-heartbeat.json.notes: n8n liveness heartbeat (every 3 hours) with email fallback. Post-ADR-0038 W3 §3.2 (O9) also writes idempotent tg_alert_acks row (topic=meta, P3) per heartbeat tick so /alerts pending and WF-103 see a uniform paper-trail across all 17 wired workflows; Telegram message keeps disable_notification=true and inline-keyboard is informational (operator can dismiss via ✅ Прочитав).

103-alert-escalation-cron.json.notes: Cron */5 min → POST /api/internal/alerts/pending (olderThanMinutes=15, notYetEscalated=true) → filter to P0/P1 → for each: POST /alerts/escalate → DM founder via @OpenClaw_sergeant_bot raw HTTP. ADR-0038 §3.2 — closes pain P2 (alerts without accountability) by giving every unacked P0/P1 a persistent push notification. Activate after WF-104 + WF-04 are smoke-tested in n8n staging.

104-alert-callback-router.json.notes: Telegram trigger (callback_query) → parse `ack:<r|i|m>:<alertId>` OR `snooze:<1h|4h>:<alertId>` → POST /api/internal/alerts/ack (ack-branch) or /alerts/snooze (snooze-branch) → editMessageText (drop buttons + footer) → answerCallbackQuery. ADR-0038 §3.2 + Sprint 6 escalation tiers (WF-105 T2 keyboard includes snooze 1h/4h). SERGEANT_ALERT_BOT_TOKEN is the raw bot token used for editMessageText / answerCallbackQuery.

105-alert-repeat-ping-cron.json.notes: Tier 2 escalation cron — */15 min → POST /api/internal/alerts/pending (olderThanMinutes=60, notYetRepeated=true, notSnoozed=true) → for each: POST /alerts/repeat (marks repeated_at) → re-broadcast у the alert's original chat/thread із prefix `⚠ REPEAT (Nхв без ack)` + inline keyboard (✅ Прочитав / 🕐 Snooze 1h / 🕓 Snooze 4h). Migration 063 додає `repeated_at`/`snoozed_until_at` колонки. Activate after WF-103/WF-104 проходять smoke у staging.

106-alert-sentry-warn-cron.json.notes: Tier 3 escalation cron — */15 min → POST /api/internal/alerts/pending (olderThanMinutes=120, notYetSentryWarned=true, notSnoozed=true) → for each: POST /alerts/sentry-warn (server-side `Sentry.captureMessage(level=warning, tags.kind=unacked-alert-escalation)` + marks `sentry_warned_at`). No Telegram side-effect — Sentry dashboard + email is the off-channel signal when founder is offline. Migration 063 додає `sentry_warned_at` колонку.
